_meta.source: Web research + Notion Bangladesh AI Subscription Market Research + Strategy (Jul 2026)
_meta.methodology: Searched active BD AI-subscription sellers; captured products, prices, delivery, payment, trust signals. Ranked gaps by revenue impact based on BD freelancer/creator demand data.

executiveSummary.biggestOpportunity: Payment friction: 239M MFS accounts vs 2.95M credit cards. AIPS fills the gap with bKash/Nagad + trust (warranty, own-account, instant human support).
executiveSummary.biggestThreat: Google sells localized Gemini in BDT (AI Plus ৳600, AI Pro ৳2,500). AIPS ৳500 Gemini undercuts Google itself — advertise this.
executiveSummary.p0Gap: CapCut Pro — massive short-form-video demand + heavy local reseller activity. Currently missing from catalog. Must add immediately.
executiveSummary.positioning: Authentic official subscriptions at official price, instant delivery, trusted & fast. Never claim 'authorized distributor/partner'.

competitors.name: OneBrain
competitors.aipsCounter: Position against shared-credential risk; sell own-account + 30-day warranty + instant human support

competitors.name: Netflix Mart BD
competitors.aipsCounter: AIPS CapCut Pro at ৳399 with warranty + own-account + instant delivery beats shared-credential risk

competitors.name: Digitally Buy
competitors.aipsCounter: Competitive on price but AIPS wins on trust stack (warranty + own-account + instant support)

competitors.name: Digital Products BD
competitors.aipsCounter: AIPS undercuts on CapCut + adds warranty + own-account guarantee

competitors.name: BD Subscription
competitors.aipsCounter: AIPS monthly option (৳399) more accessible than yearly commitment

competitors.name: AdobeWala
competitors.aipsCounter: AIPS should add Adobe Firefly (official, safe) as alternative to grey-market Adobe CC

competitors.name: IT Mart / PAN BD / MangoMind BD
competitors.aipsCounter: AIPS's full website + warranty + transparent pricing + brand pages = massive trust advantage

competitors.name: Google (Official localized)
competitors.aipsCounter: AIPS Gemini ৳500 undercuts Google's own ৳600 price + adds personal support + faster delivery

missingProducts.reason: Massive BD short-form-video demand (TikTok/Reels/Shorts); heaviest local reseller activity; 49.8M YouTube reach; creator economy core tool. Competitors selling at ৳299–৳700. AIPS can capture creator segment.
Paraphrase/grammar for students & freelancers; pairs with Grammarly. Official $8.33/mo (annual). Large student market.
Massive BD creator/designer demand. Official $12.99/mo. Competitors selling shared at ৳200–৳500. AIPS can sell own-account with warranty.
Core tool for freelancers, students, job seekers. Official $12/mo. Large addressable market. Pairs with QuillBot.
Commercial-safe AI design for pro designers/agencies. Std $9.99/mo, Pro $19.99/mo. Alternative to grey-market Adobe CC from AdobeWala.
Office 365 + AI integration for corporate/SME users. Official $20/mo. BD corporate segment growing.
Brand-voice marketing copy for content agencies. High ARPU but smaller addressable market in BD.
SEO/AI-visibility for agencies. High ARPU. Smaller but valuable niche.

categoryGaps.note: Currently only 'AI Video' (gen) exists. Need 'Video Editing' category for CapCut, Descript.
Currently 'AI Image & Design' covers gen only. Need standalone Design category.
High-ARPU agency niche. Currently under AI Writing & SEO (1 product).

pricingGaps.action: Advertise 'cheaper than Google's own price' on all Gemini pages
Position AIPS shared ChatGPT ৳350 as 'own-account, not risky shared token' + warranty
AIPS CapCut ৳399 with warranty + own-account = trust premium at minimal price delta

trustGaps.action: Add honest review section with rating breakdown
Add 'recently ordered' ticker for social proof
Add referral/promo code system if enabled in Notion

recommendedActions: 1. ADD CapCut Pro IMMEDIATELY (P0). Create product entry + brand page + add to ai-video category + sitemap + navbar.
2. Bake positioning on every page: 'authentic official subscriptions at official price · 3,000+ customers · 30-day warranty · 5-15 min delivery · bKash/Nagad'.
3. Create 'Services' page showcasing all AIPS offerings (bundles, setup, team quotes, renewal, gifts, invoicing).
4. Build segment hub pages: Freelancer, Creator, Developer, Student, Business — each with recommended stack + bundle + CTA.
5. Add 'CapCut Pro Bangladesh' as first new brand page; replicate pattern for Canva, Grammarly, QuillBot.
6. Update sitemap with all new product/brand URLs.
7. Run typecheck + screenshot verification after each batch.
